releases.description: Nerion 1.5.3 makes cloud file explanations work out of the box while keeping fully local AI one click away.

items.title: Cloud AI with No Setup
items.description: Premium users can use Nerion Cloud AI immediately—there is no OpenAI account, API key, model download, or usage bill to configure.

items.title: Nerion's Ready-to-Use Model
items.description: File and folder explanations use Nerion's tuned cloud prompt to give short, practical context and a clear keep-or-delete recommendation.

items.title: Cloud or Fully Local
items.description: Choose zero-setup Cloud AI or switch to Ollama whenever you want analysis to stay entirely on your computer.

items.title: Files Stay on Your Device
items.description: Cloud analysis sends only the selected item's metadata and derived path context. Nerion never uploads the file itself or reads its contents for AI analysis.

items.title: Translucent Settings Workspace
items.description: Settings now shares the main window's refined translucent material while keeping the scan workspace hidden behind it.

releases.description: Nerion 1.5.2 makes repeat scans dramatically lighter, keeps very large folders responsive, and gives Settings a focused full-page workspace.

items.title: Faster Repeat Scans
items.description: Unchanged folders can reuse a private on-device scan index. macOS change history and live filesystem monitoring automatically send changed or uncertain locations back through a complete scan.

items.title: Responsive Large Folders
items.description: Nerion now renders only visible file rows, limits the treemap to meaningful blocks, and loads dates on demand so folders with thousands of items remain smooth.

items.title: Focused Settings
items.description: Settings now uses the same dark workspace as the scan view without showing or exposing the previous screen underneath.

items.title: Private Performance Diagnostics
items.description: An optional local-only diagnostic records scan timing, item counts, and index usage without file names or paths, and is erased when disabled.

releases.description: Nerion 1.5.1 makes large scans gentler on your computer, adds zero-setup Nerion Cloud AI alongside Ollama, and gives background cleanup and app-leftover review more precise results.

items.title: Nerion Cloud or Local Ollama
items.description: Paid users can choose zero-setup Nerion Cloud AI or fully local Ollama. Cloud analysis sends the selected item's details—never the file itself—and no personal API key is required.

items.title: Smoother Large Scans
items.description: Scans now yield disk and CPU time to the rest of your computer, process locations in a controlled order, and update the interface in efficient batches.

items.title: Smarter Background Scanning
items.description: Scheduled scans run at a quieter system priority, avoid competing with an active scan, and correctly collect configured cache, log, and temporary-file results.

items.title: Confident Leftover Cleanup
items.description: Only high-confidence remnants from apps that are no longer installed can be selected. Ambiguous and system-level items stay visible for review without being offered for deletion.

releases.description: Meet a cleaner, more capable Nerion with local background-item review, smarter app-leftover recommendations, and a new glass interface across macOS and Windows.

items.title: Local Security Review
items.description: Paid users can review unfamiliar startup items and high-signal disguised executables alongside a normal file scan. Analysis stays on your device and every finding explains why it deserves a look.

items.title: Smarter App Leftovers
items.description: Nerion now groups related files from uninstalled apps, includes small leftovers, and separates confident recommendations from items that deserve a manual review.

items.title: A New Glass Interface
items.description: Enjoy a refined translucent design with macOS vibrancy, Windows Mica, clearer panels, and automatic opaque fallbacks for reduced-transparency and high-contrast preferences.

items.title: Clearer Cleanup Review
items.description: Cleanup results now stay tied to the files and folders you selected, with clear moved-to-trash, removed, protected, skipped, and failed outcomes before you move on.

releases.description: This update improves Windows quick scans when some system folders are harder to read.

items.title: Safer Windows Quick Scan
items.description: Quick Scan no longer fails just because one Windows scan root is unreadable. Nerion now keeps the successful scan results instead of aborting the whole scan.

items.title: Better Default Scan Roots
items.description: The Windows default quick scan folders are now more conservative, reducing first-run scan failures caused by protected locations like Recycle Bin.

releases.description: This update improves Windows quick scans when some system folders are harder to read.

items.title: Safer Windows Quick Scan
items.description: Quick Scan no longer fails just because one Windows scan root is unreadable. Nerion now keeps the successful scan results instead of aborting the whole scan.

items.title: Better Default Scan Roots
items.description: The Windows default quick scan folders are now more conservative, reducing first-run scan failures caused by protected locations like Recycle Bin.

releases.description: This update improves Windows scanning and makes scan failures much easier to understand.

items.title: Windows Scan Reliability
items.description: Nerion now passes Windows scan paths in a safer format and handles Windows folder reads more reliably.

items.title: Clearer Scan Errors
items.description: If a Windows scan fails, Nerion now shows a real scan error instead of falling back to a misleading empty folder screen.

releases.description: This update focuses on fixing the remaining Windows scan issue.

items.title: Empty Folder Fix
items.description: Windows scans now match folder paths more reliably, fixing cases where Quick Scan or Deep Scan could incorrectly show an empty folder screen.

items.title: Scanner Parsing Cleanup
items.description: We also tightened the native scan parsing path so Windows results are handled more consistently from the scanner to the UI.

releases.description: This update fixes several important Windows issues in scanning, updates, and tray behavior.

items.title: Windows Scan Fixes
items.description: Quick Scan and Deep Scan now build Windows folder trees more reliably instead of showing empty results right after scanning.

items.title: Windows Updater Fix
items.description: The updater now looks for the correct Windows release metadata, so checking for updates should work properly on Windows.

items.title: Tray Close Behavior
items.description: Closing the app window on Windows now keeps Nerion running in the system tray when tray mode is enabled.

releases.description: This update improves the new Windows experience and makes app updates much smoother.

items.title: Windows Scan Fixes
items.description: Quick Scan now correctly builds and displays Windows folders instead of showing empty results right after scanning.

items.title: Smarter App Updates
items.description: Nerion now checks for updates automatically, downloads them in the background, and guides you straight to the restart button when an update is ready.

releases.description: This update adds Windows support.

items.title: Windows Support
items.description: Nerion is now available on Windows, bringing all the powerful features you love on macOS to your Windows PC.

items.title: Bug Fixes & Polish
items.description: We've squashed some bugs and made various small improvements to make your experience smoother and more enjoyable.

releases.description: This update adds Windows support.

items.title: Windows Support
items.description: Nerion is now available on Windows, bringing all the powerful features you love on macOS to your Windows PC.

items.title: Bug Fixes & Polish
items.description: We've squashed some bugs and made various small improvements to make your experience smoother and more enjoyable.

releases.description: This update adds faster cleanup controls, smarter Smart Clean recommendations, and clearer protection for important folders.

items.title: Instantly Delete Items
items.description: You can now delete files and folders instantly from the app, without the need to send them to the trash. Just open settings and toggle 'Delete items immediately' to enable this feature.

items.title: Trash in Smart Clean
items.description: Smart Clean can now detect Trash contents, recommend them automatically, and include Trash in Quick Scan so it's easier to clear space in one pass.

items.title: Protected Folder Indicators
items.description: Important macOS folders now show a clear Protected badge in the block view, list view, Smart Clean, and review screen so it's easier to understand what should stay untouched.

items.title: Bug Fixes & Polish
items.description: We've squashed some bugs and made various small improvements to make your experience smoother and more enjoyable.

releases.description: This update brings cloud-powered AI analysis and a handful of polish fixes to the menu bar and scan engine.

items.title: Cloud AI Analysis
items.description: AI-powered insights on every file now work out of the box, no Ollama required. Local AI is still available as an opt-in in Settings → AI.

items.title: Accurate Menu Bar Timestamps
items.description: The "last scan" time in the menu bar now refreshes every minute, so it never shows a stale "just now" after hours have passed.
